name: Status Scribe
author: QUILL Team
description: Adds a live word-count cell to the status bar, updated after every save. Demonstrates the status_bar contribution, api.log() developer logging, and the quillin.enabled/quillin.disabled lifecycle events.

document_events.title: Refresh word count after save
document_events.description: Counts words in the saved document and pushes the count into the status bar cell so it stays current without polling.

document_events.title: Show word count for active document
document_events.description: Updates the status bar cell whenever you switch tabs so the count always reflects the document currently in focus.

document_events.title: Status Scribe enabled
document_events.description: Announces activation and logs a developer message to the Developer Console.

document_events.title: Status Scribe disabled
document_events.description: Clears the status bar cell and logs deactivation.

document_events.title: Update counting mode
document_events.description: Applies the new counting mode (words, characters, or sentences) immediately when the preference changes.

status_bar.label: Words: --
status_bar.tooltip: Live document word count. Updates after every save and when switching tabs.

preferences.title: Status Scribe
preferences.description: Settings for the Status Scribe Quillin.

tabs.title: Display
tabs.description: Control what the status bar cell shows.

settings.label: Count
settings.description: What to measure and display in the status bar cell.

settings.label: Show label in cell
settings.description: Prefix the count with a label such as 'Words:' for context.

tabs.title: Announce
tabs.description: When and how to speak the count aloud.

settings.label: Speak count after save
settings.description: In addition to updating the status bar, speak the count aloud after every save.

settings.label: Announcement priority
settings.description: Screen reader urgency channel for the spoken count. 'quiet' lets it queue behind other speech.
